title: Subitem Automation - Task date change
excerpt:
Hello! I was wondering if anyone knew of a way to get a Task Date to populate (x amount of days before) for a subitem based on the “Date” column.   
Any help would be appreciated!

posts.author: andy.carrillo (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml:
